summary: Full QA testing for WhatToEat pregnancy nutrition app - App Store/Play Store submission readiness. All critical flows tested: app launch, onboarding, authentication, home page, search, filters, navigation, data handling, responsive design, and edge cases. Backend: 22/22 tests passed. Frontend: All flows working correctly.

onboarding: Create Account page loads after disclaimer
Apple Sign-In shows iOS-only error message on web
Onboarding does NOT loop back to disclaimer after completion
Onboarding step persists at 5 after reload
authentication: Logout clears session and returns to onboarding step 0
User data stored correctly in localStorage
home_page: Daily tip visible with CDC source
search: Typing in search filters foods instantly
Special characters handled without crash (tested: <script>, café, 🍎)
Rapid typing does not crash app
filters: 13 category pills displayed (All, Beverages, Condiments, Dairy, etc.)
Category filter works (Beverages: 23 items, Fruits filtered correctly)
4 safety filters displayed (All, Safe, Limit, Avoid)
Rapid filter changes handled without crash
navigation: All 4 bottom nav tabs work (Home, FAQ, Topics, About)
FAQ page loads with search and 10 category filters
Topics page loads with premium lock icons
About page loads with version and features
Home tab returns to home page
food_detail_modal: Food detail modal opens on click
premium_page: Premium page accessible from locked food items
Continue with Free Version option available
responsive: Bottom nav visible within mobile viewport (y=741)
All category pills visible on tablet

critical_code_review_comments: Search functionality appears fully functional - no issues found matching previous Apple rejection
Native auth plugins (Google/Apple Sign-In) are MOCKED for web preview - only work in native iOS/Android builds
Apple IAP purchase flow is MOCKED - real implementation requires native Capacitor plugin
test_credentials: localStorage: onboardingStep='5', user JSON object, isAuthenticated='true'
seed_data_creation: Used localStorage to simulate authenticated user state
context_for_next_testing_agent: Full QA testing completed for App Store submission. All critical flows verified: onboarding (no loop back issue), search (working perfectly with all edge cases), filters, navigation, premium page, responsive design. Backend has 288 foods with proper safety levels. Client-side filtering is used - backend provides all foods, frontend filters by category/safety. Native auth plugins (Google/Apple Sign-In) and Apple IAP are mocked in web preview - only functional in native iOS/Android builds.

mocked_apis.Google Sign-In: Only works in native iOS/Android builds via Capacitor
mocked_apis.Apple Sign-In: Only works in native iOS builds via Capacitor (shows iOS-only message on web)
mocked_apis.Apple IAP: Purchase flow mocked - requires native Capacitor plugin
